title: No rain particle
description: Removes rain particles for a cleaner visual experience during rainy weather while preserving Minecraft’s vanilla atmosphere.
body:
# 🌧 No Rain Particles

No Rain Particles is a lightweight Minecraft resource pack that removes rain particle effects to provide a cleaner and less distracting visual experience during rainy weather.

The pack preserves Minecraft's original look and atmosphere while eliminating the particle effects that appear when rain hits blocks and surfaces. This creates a clearer view of the environment without altering gameplay mechanics or weather behavior.

---

## 🌊 Overview

Rain can sometimes create visual clutter, especially during exploration, building sessions, PvP encounters, or SMP gameplay. No Rain Particles removes these rain splash effects while keeping the weather system itself fully intact.

The pack is designed for players who prefer a cleaner screen during rainy conditions and want to maintain visibility without changing Minecraft's vanilla aesthetic. Weather, sounds, and gameplay remain unchanged—only the visual rain particles are removed.

Its lightweight design makes it suitable for everyday survival gameplay, multiplayer servers, and long building sessions where visual clarity is preferred.

---

## ✨ Features

> • Removes rain splash particles
> • Cleaner visibility during rainy weather
> • Vanilla-friendly appearance
> • Lightweight and simple implementation
> • Does not affect weather mechanics
> • Compatible with Survival, SMP & Creative gameplay

---

## 🎮 Recommended For

> • Survival Players
> • SMP Servers
> • Builders
> • PvP Players
> • Players who prefer minimal visual clutter

---

## 🧩 Resolution

> **16x Default Minecraft Resolution**

---

## 🛠 Compatibility

> **Minecraft 1.19+ / 1.20+ / 1.21+**

---

## 📜 Asset Ownership

All modifications in **No Rain Particles** were created by me.
No assets were copied or extracted from other resource packs.

---

### 👤 Creator

> by **GAMER_TIGE99**
